title: Senior Doctor - Sun Pharmaceutical - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Sun Pharmaceutical - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Sun Pharmaceutical has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sun Pharmaceutical:
Sun Pharmaceutical is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical!
